guestClockNote: guest free-runs (networktime off); all trial math uses GUEST wall-clock
consentResidue: one trashed L5-CONSENT-PROJ (type=1) from the L5 consent absorption run — not in the seed manifest; probe assertions tolerate it (runbook §5.3)
shortcutsConsent: output-class actions Always-Allowed on the golden (headless in clones); delete-class actions have no Always-Allow and re-prompt every run (tier-3, oddities 5j)

tcc.appleEvents_sshd: granted (image default; both Things3 + System Events work prompt-free)
tcc.accessibility: not needed (monitor uses CGWindowList, not AX API)
tcc.screenRecording: granted (monitor + sshd) — confirmed empirically 2026-07-03: window titles readable in probe evidence (run u-20260703-062903, U01 saw title 'Today'). Gates window TITLES and screenshots only; window existence/geometry + all NSWorkspace events work without it

disruptionMonitor: LaunchAgent com.thingslab.disruption-monitor running in Aqua session; emits launch/activate/terminate/frontmost/window-new/window-close

l5Progress.addressing: Find Items offers an ID filter (no Name filter — name field is Title); all mutation proxies address by uuid via ID + Find->act chains
l5Progress.verdicts: heading create/rename/delete WORK (S02-S04); single-item permanent delete WORKS, no tombstone (S-delperm); find returns title text; set-detail Reminder Time inconclusive on unscheduled item — see docs/lab/s-campaign-results.md
l5Progress.note: consent absorption run mutated the golden (sacrificial L5-CONSENT-* entities, cleaned up); one trashed project residue (see consentResidue)
